Canonical template for the [Blog Post (Long Form)](/writing-style-catalog/reference/formats/blog-post-long-form/) format.

```markdown
[Title: specific, not generic]

[Opening: establishes specific argument and stakes - 2-3 paragraphs]

[Section 1 header]
[Content - 300-500 words]

[Section 2 header]
[Content - 300-500 words]

[Section 3 header]
[Content - 300-500 words]

[Closing: landing, not summary - 2-3 paragraphs]
```
